# Roger Wilco Aviation Services (RWAS)

> FAA Part 145 Repair Station (Certificate RWSR491E) in Yankton, South Dakota, specializing in Garmin avionics installation, aircraft maintenance, non-destructive testing, and sheet metal fabrication. Founded by John Halsted, a veteran pilot with 40+ years in aviation. Serving the Northern Plains: South Dakota, Nebraska, Iowa, Minnesota, North Dakota, Wyoming, and Montana.

- **Phone:** (605) 299-8178
- **Email:** avionics@rwas.team
- **Location:** Chan Gurney Municipal Airport (KYKN), Yankton, SD
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CT
- **Certifications:** FAA Part 145 Certificate RWSR491E, Certified Garmin Dealer, NBAA Member, AEA Member

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.rogerwilcoaviation.com/) — Overview of services and featured capabilities
- [About](https://www.rogerwilcoaviation.com/about) — Company history, founder bio, contact details
- [Shop Capabilities](https://www.rogerwilcoaviation.com/shop-capabilities) — Full catalog of services: Garmin installations, A&P maintenance, NDT, fabrication
- [Garmin](https://www.rogerwilcoaviation.com/garmin/) — Garmin product updates, bulletins, promotions
- [Blog](https://www.rogerwilcoaviation.com/blog/) — Aviation news, service bulletins, Garmin memos, shop dispatches
- [Aircraft for Sale](https://www.rogerwilcoaviation.com/aircraft-for-sale) — Aircraft marketplace powered by Captain Jerry's guided intake
- [Financing](https://www.rogerwilcoaviation.com/financing) — Avionics upgrade financing options

## Services

### Garmin Avionics Installation
Certified Garmin dealer offering full glass-cockpit upgrades and STC'd installations for single-engine piston aircraft.
- G3X Touch Suite (glass cockpit with ADAHRS, EIS, synthetic vision)
- GTN 650Xi / 750Xi GPS/NAV/COMM navigators with WAAS LPV approaches
- GFC 500 Autopilot (retrofit digital autopilot)
- ADS-B Out compliance (FAR 91.227)

### Airframe & Powerplant Maintenance
Full FAR 43 / Part 91 / Part 135 aircraft maintenance with logbook documentation.
- Annual inspections
- 100-hour inspections
- Pre-buy & condition inspections
- AOG "Go-Van" service
- Propeller balancing
- Aircraft weight certification (up to 30,000 lbs)

### Non-Destructive Testing & Inspection
Level 3 NDT services with FAA Form 8130-3 return to service.
- Eddy current testing
- Dye penetrant testing (ASTM E1417)
- Magnetic particle inspection
- Ultrasound testing
- Visual testing
- Rockwell hardness testing

### Fabrication & Manufacturing
In-house CNC and laser capabilities for aircraft panels, structural components, and precision tooling.
- CNC router fabrication
- Fiber laser cutting and welding
- Aircraft panel fabrication
- Sheet metal repair and replacement
- Multi-color powder coating
- UV printing
- CO2 laser engraving

## Papa-Alpha Rigging Tools

Precision flight-control rigging reference tools for Piper aircraft, designed in-house and manufactured from CNC-machined aircraft-grade aluminum. Powder coated and UV printed with permanent reference markings.

- Covers stabilator, rudder, aileron, flap, and bell crank rigging
- Compatible with Piper PA-28, PA-30, PA-31, and PA-36 series
- Complete rigging kit from $264
- Individual tools from $59.99
- Available at: rogerwilcoaviation.com, Aircraft Spruce, and Amazon (coming soon)
- Shop collection: https://www.rogerwilcoaviation.com/collections/rigging-tools

## Captain Jerry

Captain Jerry is an AI avionics expert available 24/7 via the floating chat widget on every page. Jerry handles service inquiries, aircraft listing intake, technical questions about Garmin products, and general scheduling. Accessible from the homepage anchor [#ask-jerry](https://www.rogerwilcoaviation.com/#ask-jerry).
